TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tausa ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 12 buwan, 592 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 73%, Tayan 10%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tausa hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tausa hya' ga Swasal. tay 'llaw na Tausa hya' ga Bgurah branaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo qalang Tausa maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tausa ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ taus~Й•a ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu zos~Й•i ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, s~Й•etik **%, tajan **%, amis~Й• *%, ОІunun *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•was~Й•al. taj К”llaw na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІЙЈuraД§ ОІranaw. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo qalaЕ‹ taus~Й•a maki * Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan qalaЕ‹ taus~Й•a ЙЈa uЕ‹at pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Tausa ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 12 buwan, 592 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 73%, Tayan 10%, Amis 2%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Truku 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tausa hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tausa hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tausa hya' ga Swasal. tay 'llaw na Tausa hya' ga Bgurah branaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo qalang Tausa maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tausa ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ taus~Й•a ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu zos~Й•i ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, s~Й•etik **%, tajan **%, amis~Й• *%, ОІunun *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj К”zil na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•was~Й•al. taj К”llaw na taus~Й•a Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІЙЈuraД§ ОІranaw. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo qalaЕ‹ taus~Й•a maki * Д§as~Й•is~Й•jo. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan qalaЕ‹ taus~Й•a ЙЈa uЕ‹at pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
